german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of positions remains unclassified, highlighting accessibility challenges in the job market.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between Core and Technical PM positions, indicating potential constraints in talent accessibility.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: With 56% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site work over hybrid and remote arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with limited remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 43% of roles demand AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
